mapper.select: SELECT file_id , project_id , version_id , file_code , original_name , stored_name , file_path , file_size , upload_user_id , upload_date , file_version , file_use_yn , connect_address FROM attach_file WHERE upload_user_id = #{uploadUserId} AND file_use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY upload_date DESC
SELECT A.*, U.user_name AS user_name FROM attach_file A LEFT JOIN users U ON A.upload_user_id = U.user_id WHERE A.file_id = #{fileId}
SELECT project_id FROM ( SELECT pm.project_id FROM project_member pm WHERE pm.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY pm.joined_at DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project_member pm JOIN team_member tm ON pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id WHERE pm.project_id = #{projectId} AND tm.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT version_id FROM ( SELECT version_id FROM project_version WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY version_id DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM =1
SELECT code_id, note FROM common_code WHERE code_name = '0F'
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'FILE_DOWNLOAD_HISTORY_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYMM') || '_' || LPAD( NVL(MAX(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(download_history_id, -4))), 0) + 1, 4, '0' ) FROM file_download_history WHERE download_history_id LIKE 'FILE_DOWNLOAD_HISTORY_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYMM') || '_%'
INSERT INTO file_download_history ( download_history_id, file_id, download_user_id, download_date ) VALUES ( #{downloadHistoryId}, #{fileId}, #{downloadUserId}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT h.download_history_id AS downloadHistoryId, h.file_id AS fileId, h.download_user_id AS downloadUserId, u.user_name AS userName, TO_CHAR(h.download_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS downloadDate FROM file_download_history h LEFT JOIN users u ON h.download_user_id = u.user_id WHERE h.file_id = #{fileId} ORDER BY h.download_date DESC
